name: Nerdy Inc.
business: Nerdy Inc. operates a next-generation live tutoring and intervention platform that leverages AI to personalize learning. It connects learners of all ages to tutors and instructors via its proprietary platform, offering one-on-one instruction, small group tutoring, classes, and self-study tools. Its solutions are sold directly to consumers through Learning Memberships and to education systems through Varsity Tutors for Schools.

exposures.sentence: We leverage both internally developed and externally licensed capabilities related to AI and machine learning, which allows large data sets to be leveraged and understood in a way that can generate substantial insights that drive the personalization of the learning experience.

catalysts.event: Remaining $10,000 thousand under first tranche of Term Loan available to be drawn
catalysts.sentence: The remaining $10,000 thousand under the first tranche of Term Loan is available to be drawn until December 31, 2026.
